ShortDescription.Value: Change blue outlines to any color or opacity. Surface layers on/off, District colors.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Mochi's Hover Colors
**Major additions in 0.9.0 update**: please check new city Hover Color panel - added color swatches + tooltips and more choices in the mod's Options menu!
- Change the blue outline color that has haunted every part of your city. - If you can hover over it then you can probably change it: buildings, cars, trees, cims, etc.! - Guidelines: change opacity so you can see items being placed and not just a thick white line! - Surfaces: turn off preview layers while using the Surface tool so you can see the real ground colors without a cloudy layer on top. - District tool: change the color + opacity of district borders and overlays, or turn them off completely.
## Important - Check the Options menu for bulldozer and road-tool color behavior. - To turn off panel tooltips, click the Info button in the top-left of the in-city panel. - **Darker panel** option. Recommended for LegacyUI or players who prefer darker high contrast. Try both panels and see what you like! - Alpha is transparency; it's the last bar on the color picker. - Tap preset 1 or 2 to switch your saved colors. - Change presets: select a color from the main color picker, then hold preset 1 or 2 until the fill bar completes. - Hotkeys are in the Options menu. Read the tooltips or Options Menu 3rd panel if you get lost. - Save-game safe and safe to remove any time. - No known compatibility issues. No Harmony patches. - Performance Optimized: when the panel is closed, it is not doing active layout work; the C# systems mostly sit idle unless a relevant state changes, example, you change a color, mod takes action, then goes back idle.
### Feedback
- Please send suggestions, bug reports, or just say hi! - This mod took many months to overcome many obstacles in game code. - This is a passion project and I want to make it the best it can be, so please share your thoughts and suggestions! -- River Mochi
## ❤️ Special Thanks * Huge shout out to everyone who tested or supported the mod on its long journey to release* - Flashbond - collab, tech feedback, testing - yenyang - collab, tech feedback, testing - StarQ - tech feedback, testing - gagaxm - feature idea, testing - Dx, Necko1996, BugsyG, ElGendo87 - testing - =Noel= Thumbnail, testing
### 15+ Languages - English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski, 简体中文 , 한국어 - Português Brasil, 繁體中文 , 日本語 WIP: Thai ภาษาไทย, Vietnamese Tiếng Việt, Turkish Türkçe, EU Portuguese Português
tags: Mochi's blue scrubber, Highlight, border color, remove blue, guidelines, district colors, surface tool, custom colors, transparency.
Publish.ChangeLog: - UI/UX improvements - added 3 Guide line color preset swatches to customize the new road tool (for circles with spacing lines and road overlay color). - clicking on Guideline icon button resets to vanilla colors all guidelines and road overlays (usually cyan). - updated translations. - District tool: added reset to vanilla. - main keybind changed to "J". Now have "J", ""K", and "L" hotkeys - change or remove these in HC Options menu.
